pages.title: Start with 心
pages.text: Craft a wooden stave. Hold it, press $(l)G$(), and write $(l)心$().$(br2)This first cast proves four things: the circle opens, your writing is recognized, the glyph is implemented, and the effect appears on your character.

pages.title: Two circles
pages.text: $(l)G$() opens the body writing circle. Body glyphs mostly affect you.$(br2)$(l)V$() opens the inscription circle. 山, 裂, and 印 use it for world positions; 泉 can also use it to heal players near the target block.

pages.title: Close rules
pages.text: The circle closes when you finish writing, move too far away, change dimension, die, or log out.$(br2)If it remains open after movement, step away from the writing point; distance cleanup is there so the circle cannot keep eating left clicks.

pages.title: Valid glyphs
pages.text: Only implemented glyphs cast. Unknown characters show a message and do not gain momentum or spend durability.$(br2)Current core set: 心 命 救 息 忍 净 坚 稳 隐 明 脉 力 怒 魄 入 出 劫 印 泉 山 裂 墨.

pages.title: State cleanup
pages.text: Glyphbound custom states clear on death, logout, world switch, or server stop. Temporary terrain and arenas also clean themselves.$(br2)Vanilla potion effects follow normal Minecraft rules.

pages.title: First route
pages.text: Recommended order:$(br)1. Craft a wooden stave.$(br)2. Write $(l)心$().$(br)3. Before caving, write $(l)命$() or $(l)忍$().$(br)4. Under pressure, learn $(l)净$(), $(l)稳$(), and $(l)力$().$(br2)Do not memorize the whole book first. Learn how to survive.
